sourceOverview.notes: Low-latency STT. Innovative features. Real-time focus.

activeModelsSummary.stt:
Soniox v4 Async [v4-async]
Soniox v4 Real-Time [v4-realtime]

audit.priceRangeSummary: About $0.10/hour async and $0.12/hour realtime from official pricing references.
audit.limitsSummary: API free credits were discontinued in late 2025. Mixed-language support, speaker detection, and translation are included. Audio is not stored.
audit.regionSummary: Global API with in-region processing / sovereign cloud options.
audit.freeTierSummary: No general API free credits now (consumer app has separate free credits).
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Very attractive pricing for STT. Model picker should distinguish API vs non-API free offerings so users do not assume API is free.

supplementalResearch.title: 56. Soniox (US) — STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 56. Soniox (US) — STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Ultra-low-latency focus.

`stt-rt-v4` (real-time), `stt-async-v4` (file). Token-based: ~$0.10/hr async, ~$0.12/hr real-time. **60+ languages** with native code-switching. All features included (diarization, translation, timestamps). **Sovereign Cloud:** US, EU, Japan (data stays in-region). WebSocket. ⚠️ Free tier discontinued (October 2025).

---
